audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace, accompanied by a background of classical music.
temporal_description: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light blue shirt and dark tie, is seated in an office chair, holding a plastic bag containing an ID card. The ID card, which has a photo of the man and visible text, is partially obscured by bloodstains. The man’s gaze is directed downward at the ID card, and his posture is upright. The background includes blinds and office equipment, suggesting an office environment.
